Class-Bard 20 — Female Human Bard: 20
Strength: 14 (+2) Dexterity: 14 (+2) Constitution: 9 (-1) Intelligence: 16 (+3) Wisdom: 13 (+1) Charisma: 15 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Chaotic Good Deity: Celtic-Briantia (NG)
Ability Boosts: Strength Experience: 820306/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 210/420
Ability Notes:
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Observant: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Intelligence, Wisdom)
Ability Boosts: 1 to distribute
Jack Of All Trades: +3 on non-proficient ability checks
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Bard (Bard College); Bard (Fighting Style)
Feats: Charger; Healer; Magic Initiate (Sorcerer); Observant; Savage Attacker Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Bard Features: Armor Proficiency (Light); Bard College; Bardic Inspiration; Blade Flourish; Bonus Proficiencies (College Of Swords); College Of Glamour; College Of Swords; College Of Whispers; Countercharm; Defensive Flourish; Enthralling Performance; Expertise; Extra Attack; Fighting Style (Dueling); Fighting Style (Two-Weapon Fighting); Font Of Inspiration; Jack Of All Trades; Magical Secrets; Mantle Of Inspiration; Mantle Of Majesty; Mantle Of Whispers; Master's Flourish; Mobile Flourish; Psychic Blades (College Of Whispers); Save Proficiency (Dexterity; Charisma); Shadow Lore; Skill Proficiency (Choose 3 from any); Slashing Flourish; Song Of Rest; Spellcasting; Superior Inspiration; Tool Proficiency (Choose 3 from any Musical Instrument); Unbreakable Majesty; Weapon Proficiency (Simple Weapons; Hand Crossbow; Longsword; Rapier; Shortsword); Words Of Terror Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Bard College: 1 selection
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Celtic-Briantia and fellow believers
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +2 Insight: (wis) +13 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +1 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +3 Investigation: (int) +3 Religion: (int) +9
Athletics: (str) +2 Medicine: (wis) +13 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +2
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +15 Stealth: (dex) +2
History: (int) +3 Perception: (wis) +13 Survival: (wis) +1
Skill Proficiency: Insight; Medicine; Nature; Perception; Religion
Expertise: Insight; Medicine; Nature; Perception
Tool Proficiency: Lyre; Pan Flute; Viol
Languages: Common; Deep Speech; Elvish; Giant
Skill Notes:
Expertise: Expertise (Choose 4 from any Skill)
Countercharm: R30' Performance gives friendly listeners advantage on saves vs. charmed and frightened until the end of the next turn
Enthralling Performance: R60' Can use 1 min performance once per short rest to charm 2 listeners (save DC 16 Will negates) for 1 hr or until damaged or self attacks the target or its ally
Healer: Using a healer's kit to stabilize also restores 1 hit point/Can expend a use of a healer's kit to restore 1d6+4 + target HD hit points once per creature per short rest
Observant: Can read lips/+5 passive Investigation and passive Perception
Words Of Terror: Can use 1 min of conversation to frighten a target (save DC 16 Wisdom negates) for 1 hr or until the target or an ally is attacked or damaged once per short rest
Combat
Hit Points: 54 Initiative: +2 Armor Class: 14
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium Weapon Proficiency: Hand Crossbow; Longsword; Rapier; Scimitar; Shortsword; Simple Weapons
Armor: Studded Leather Shield: None Weapons: Mace (+8 1d6+2 B); Quarterstaff (+8 1d6+2 B [2h d8]); Sling (+8 1d4+2 B R30/120); Unarmed Strike (+8 1+2 B)
Combat Notes:
Bonus Proficiencies (College Of Swords): Armor Proficiency (Medium)/Weapon Proficiency (Scimitar)
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: -20
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +2
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +2
Font Of Inspiration: Has increased Bardic Inspiration effects
Strength Attack Adjustment: +2
Strength Damage Adjustment: +2
Bardic Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action 2 times per short rest to give an ally +1d12 on an ability check, attack, or save within 10 min
Blade Flourish: Taking an Attack action gives +10 Speed until the end of the turn and allows using a flourish after a successful weapon attack once per turn
Charger: Can use a bonus action after a 10' Dash to attack, inflicting +5 damage or a 10' push
Defensive Flourish: Can expend 1 Bardic Inspiration to inflict +1d12 HP weapon damage and gain an equal bonus to Armor Class for until the start of the next turn
Extra Attack: Can make 2 attacks during an Attack action
Fighting Style (Dueling): Inflicts +2 HP with a single, one-handed melee weapon
Fighting Style (Two-Weapon Fighting): Adds the ability modifier to the damage from a second weapon attack
Mantle Of Inspiration: R60' Can use a bonus action and expend a Bardic Inspiration use to give 2 targets 14 temporary hit points and allow them to use a reaction to make an immediate move without provoking opportunity attacks
Master's Flourish: Can roll 1d6 instead of expending a Bardic Inspiration die for a flourish
Mobile Flourish: Can expend 1 Bardic Inspiration to inflict +1d12 weapon damage and a 5' + 1d12' push, optionally using a reaction to follow the foe
Psychic Blades (College Of Whispers): Can expend 1 Bardic Inspiration die to inflict +8d6 HP psychic once per turn
Savage Attacker: Can take the better of 2 melee damage rolls once per turn
Slashing Flourish: Can expend 1 Bardic Inspiration to inflict +1d12 HP weapon damage on the target and an adjacent foe
Superior Inspiration: Has a minimum of 1 use of Bardic Inspiration available after initiative
Unbreakable Majesty: Can use a bonus action to prevent foes from attacking self for 1 min (save DC 16 Charisma negates and inflicts disadvantage on saves vs. self spells until the end of the next turn)
Save Proficiency: Charisma; Dexterity
Save: Charisma: +8; Constitution: -1; Dexterity: +8; Intelligence: +3; Strength: +2; Wisdom: +1
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: B0: 4; B: 22; S0: 2; S: 1 Spell Slots: B1: 4; B2: 3; B3: 3; B4: 3; B5: 3; B6: 2; B7: 2; B8: 1; B9: 1 Attack: B: +8; S: +8 Spell DC: B: 16; S: 16
Spells:
Acid Splash (S0 Conj): (Action) R60' Inflicts 4d6 HP acid (save Dexterity negates) on a single target or 2 adjacent targets
Cloud Of Daggers (B2 Conj): (Action) R60' 5' cube inflicts 4d4 HP slashing for concentration up to 1 min (+Level inflicts +2d4 HP)
Command (B1 [Mantle Of Majesty] Ench): (Action) R60' Target obeys a one-word command from self on its next turn (save Wisdom negates) (+Level affects +1 target)
Dancing Lights (B0 Evoc): (Action) R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per turn as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Detect Magic (B1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals magic auras and their schools for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Detect Thoughts (B2 Divi): (Action) R30' Detects the presence of minds or reveals targets' surface thoughts and allows probing deeper (save Wisdom negates; additional contested Intelligence attempts each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min; 2' of rock, 2" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell
Dominate Monster (B8 Ench): (Action) R60' Target creature obeys telepathic commands (save Wisdom negates; active fighting gives advantage, and damage allows another save) for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level extends the duration to 8 hr)
Foresight (B9 Divi): (Minute) Touched gains immunity to surprise and advantage on attack, ability, and saves, and foes suffer disadvantage on attacks, for 8 hr or until cast again
Freedom Of Movement (B4 Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Friends (B0 Ench): (Action) Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Friends (S0 Ench): (Action) Self gains advantage on Charisma checks with a non-hostile target for concentration up to 1 min; the target becomes hostile afterward
Geas (B5 Ench): (Minute) R60' Target obeys self instructions or suffers 5d10 HP psychic (save Wisdom negates) each day for 30 days (+Level extends the duration to 1 year or permanently at level 7 or 9)
Glyph Of Warding (B3 Abju): (Hour) When triggered, 20' radius inflicts 5d8 HP of a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder (save Dexterity half), or a spell of up to level 3 (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP or increases the level of the triggered spell by 1)
Hallucinatory Terrain (B4 Illu): (10 Minutes) R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Light (B0 Evoc): (Action) Touched object emits a 20' bright light (save Dexterity negates) for 1 hr
Locate Creature (B4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; running water blocks the spell
Mass Cure Wounds (B5 Evoc): (Action) R60' 6 targets in a 30' radius regain 3d8+2 HP (+Level restores +1d8 HP)
Mass Suggestion (B6 Ench): (Action) R60' 12 targets follow a reasonable suggestion (save Wisdom negates) for 24 hr; damage from self or an ally ends the effects (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, or 366 days at level 7, 8, or 9)
Otto's Irresistible Dance (B6 Ench): (Action) R30' Target dances in place, suffering disadvantage on Dexterity and attacks, and foes gain advantage on attacks (save Wisdom each rd after the first ends), for concentration up to 1 min
Regenerate (B7 Tran): (Minute) Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and reattaches or regrows severed parts after 2 min
Silent Image (B1 Illu): (Action) R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Silent Image (S1 Illu): (Action) R60' Creates a 15' cube movable illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for concentration up to 10 min
Speak With Animals (B1 Divi): (Action) Self can talk with beasts for 10 min [R]
Speak With Dead (B3 Necr): (Action) R10' Self can ask a corpse 5 questions within 10 min; the corpse is then immune for 10 days
Speak With Plants (B3 Tran): (Action) Self can talk with and command plants in a 30' radius, turning difficult terrain from plant growth into normal terrain or vice versa, for 10 min
Tasha's Hideous Laughter (B1 Ench): (Action) R30' Inflicts prone, incapacitated, and laughing (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd and in response to damage end, with damage giving advantage on the save) for concentration up to 1 min
Teleport (B7 Conj): (Action) R10' Teleports an unattended 10' cube object or self and 8 willing creatures any distance; greater familiarity with the destination improves accuracy
Teleportation Circle (B5 Conj): (Minute) R10' Creates a portal that provides a link to similar circles for 1 rd; casting on the same spot every day for 1 year makes it permanent
Vicious Mockery (B0 Ench): (Action) R60' Target suffers 4d4 HP psychic and disadvantage on its next attack before the end of its next turn (save Wisdom negates)
Zone Of Truth (B2 Ench): (Action) R60' Creatures in a 15' radius cannot lie (save Charisma negates) for 10 min
Magic Notes:
Bonus Proficiencies (College Of Swords): Can use a proficient melee weapon as a bard spell focus
Magic Initiate (Sorcerer): Knows 2 Sorcerer cantrips and can cast a chosen S1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Magical Secrets: Can learn 6 additional spells from any class
Mantle Of Majesty: Can use a bonus action each turn to cast Command without expending a spell slot for concentration up to 1 min once per long rest
Mantle Of Whispers: R30' Can capture a dying person's shadow to use as a disguise (Insight vs. +5 Deception detects) for 1 hr once short rest
Shadow Lore: R30' Target obeys self commands (save DC 16 Wisdom negates) for 8 hr once per long rest
Song Of Rest: Friendly listeners who spend Hit Dice to regain hit points after a short rest recover +1d12 hit points
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the bard spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 2 available vs. 5 allocated
